Package neqsim.process.equipment.distillation

Class BlockTridiagonalMatrix

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.distillation.BlockTridiagonalMatrix
final class BlockTridiagonalMatrix extends Object
Block-tridiagonal matrix storage for staged distillation linear systems.

The matrix stores one dense lower, diagonal, and upper block per tray row. It is intentionally lightweight so residual solvers can assemble and solve banded MESH Jacobians without first allocating a full dense matrix. A dense conversion remains available for emergency fallback linear solves and diagnostics.

Version:
1.0
Author:
esol

  • Constructor Details

    • BlockTridiagonalMatrix

      BlockTridiagonalMatrix(int blockCount, int blockSize)
      Create block-tridiagonal storage.
      Parameters:
      blockCount - number of row and column blocks
      blockSize - number of equations and variables in each block
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if blockCount or blockSize is less than one

  • Method Details

    • blockFor

      double[][] blockFor(int rowBlockIndex, int columnBlockIndex)
      Select the block matching a row block and column block.
      Parameters:
      rowBlockIndex - row block index
      columnBlockIndex - column block index
      Returns:
      lower, diagonal, or upper block for the requested coupling
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the requested block is outside the tridiagonal band

    • toDense

      double[][] toDense()
      Convert block storage to a dense matrix.
      Returns:
      dense matrix containing the same coefficients

    • copyBlockToDense

      private void copyBlockToDense(double[][] dense, double[][] block, int rowBlockIndex, int columnBlockIndex)
      Copy one dense block into the corresponding dense matrix location.
      Parameters:
      dense - dense matrix to update
      block - block values to copy
      rowBlockIndex - row block index
      columnBlockIndex - column block index
